title: Project E Stuff Split
wikitext:
[]: Project E Stuff [Split]             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Jun 28, 2010 3:36 pm On a tangential note... why is 01 involved in a contact experiment when 00, which was clearly started long before, has not? Something doesn't make sense here.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Jun 28, 2010 4:07 pm Unit-01 is a 'Test-Type' so they needed to 'Test' things on it?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Jun 28, 2010 4:14 pm NemZ wrote: On a tangential note...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jun 28, 2010 4:17 pm Decided to split this from "Rei's Genetic Lineage" right away because the tangent was so huge that it's impossible to address without delving into Project E turf. And potentially interesting turf, at that. NemZ wrote: On a tangential note... why is 01 involved in a contact experiment when 00, which was clearly started long before, has not? Something doesn't make sense here.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Jun 28, 2010 4:44 pm So is it then safe to say that 00 was never actually intended for serious use and only gets upgraded to active duty because of 01's picky nature? I also get the feeling (no evidence) that Rei2 at some point did have a complete soul and only became split as a result of a CE attempt with 00 using an updated form of Kyoko's method.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Mon Jun 28, 2010 5:18 pm NemZ wrote: So is it then safe to say that 00 was never actually intended for serious use and only gets upgraded to active duty because of 01's picky nature? I also get the feeling (no evidence) that Rei2 at some point did have a complete soul and only became split as a result of a CE attempt with 00 using an updated form of Kyoko's method.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Jun 28, 2010 6:23 pm I also get the feeling (no evidence) that Rei2 at some point did have a complete soul and only became split as a result of a CE attempt with 00 using an updated form of Kyoko's method.

[]:             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Mon Jun 28, 2010 6:56 pm NemZ wrote: So is it then safe to say that 00 was never actually intended for serious use and only gets upgraded to active duty because of 01's picky nature?

[]:             Quote Post by Nightquest » Mon Jun 28, 2010 10:13 pm Killer Bee wrote: After all, it's only a test-type. Of course, Gendo himself planned to use Unit-01/Yui since the beginning, regardless of Seele's plans.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jun 28, 2010 10:58 pm NemZ wrote: I also get the feeling (no evidence) that Rei2 at some point did have a complete soul and only became split as a result of a CE attempt with 00 using an updated form of Kyoko's method.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Mon Jun 28, 2010 11:11 pm Actually, Misato says that it took Rei six/seven months to synch with Eva-00, so the scene we see in Episode 05 (taking place twenty-some days before the rest of the episode) isn't anywhere near her first.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jun 29, 2010 2:52 am Tried to redirect Hyper Shinchan to a more appropriate thread for his questions about Kaworu and Rei Eva manipulation, but that didn't work, so my OCD forced me to split the posts out before anything else could happen. :p http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=2206

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Jun 29, 2010 2:58 am Obsessive compulsive disorders are a bad thing; this thread title is a generic "Project E Stuff" and my posts weren't that much OT; you've moved them to a 3 years old thread (is it okay to necropost here?) that was about "Kaworu's Ability to Control Unit 02" and not Kaworu AND Rei relationship with EVAs", imo it's even more OT than before; that said I humbly kneel before the decision, but that was my opinion.

[]:             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Tue Jun 29, 2010 1:11 pm Nightquest wrote: I think Yui was the mastermind behind it, not Gendo. And SEELE always knew the importance of Eva-01 as the "Noha's ark" or whatever it's called. I guess it's not only a "test-type" at all.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jun 29, 2010 1:20 pm Killer Bee wrote: Also, I agree with Hyper Shinchan about the split. He was still on topic, IMO.

[]: Speakin' out against the Queen Bee.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Tue Jun 29, 2010 6:52 pm Reichu wrote: Yeah, I should have waited for some replies to pile up first. I was being paranoid. Been chewed out via PM.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Jun 29, 2010 7:11 pm Legendary wrote: Actually, Misato says that it took Rei six/seven months to synch with Eva-00, so the scene we see in Episode 05 (taking place twenty-some days before the rest of the episode) isn't anywhere near her first.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Jun 29, 2010 7:36 pm NemZ wrote: Wait a sec... I was under the impression that Rei was originally intended to be the pilot of unit 01, with Shinji only called in as a backup because she was injured in the activation experiment with 00.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue Jun 29, 2010 9:08 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: I forget what Ritsuko's pun means... Oh no? Later we get told:

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jun 29, 2010 9:12 pm Eva Yojimbo wrote: 0-9 = Oni (demon) I thought.
summary:
[]: Project E Stuff [Split]             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Jun 28, 2010 3:36 pm On a tangential note... why is 01 involved in a contact experiment when 00, which was clearly started long before, has not? Something doesn't make sense here.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Jun 28, 2010 4:07 pm Unit-01 is a 'Test-Type' so they needed to 'Test' things on
